sampleQuestions.stem: Consider the three commands: PROMPT, HEAD and RCPT. Which of the following options indicates a correct association of these commands with protocols where these are used? A. HTTP, SMTP, FTP B. FTP, HTTP, SMTP C. HTTP, FTP
